Privacy Notice & DPA Addendum — Falcon Oasis Digital Holdings Ltd (ADGM), trade licence TL-58-09Z, contact: dpo@falconoasis.ae; +971-2-000-1234.
We process PDPL personal data (Emirates ID ****-****-****-9921, DIFC/ADGM IDs, family-origin details where voluntarily provided) for onboarding, insider-list administration, and deal-room access.
For queries, contact Mr. Kareem Al-Hadi, Data Protection Officer, or submit a DSAR at https://portal.falconoasis.ae/dsar?ref=H7-9x_k.
In issuer mandates, we may receive non-public commercial terms (token pre-sale price bands, sustainability-linked coupon step-ups) and maintain SCA-compliant insider lists under information bar riers.
Employees on Project HAWK are subject to blackout windows and anti-tipping controls; calendar invites labelled “quiet period” trigger auto-restrictions in our D I F C entity.
Prior to any VARA notification, crypto wallet whitelists and validator node IPs are classified as restricted; access is logged and segregated.
In a cyber incident investigation, we collect device telemetry and obfuscated account IDs (acct: gmdm-**Q4-71**) to meet breach notification duties without unnecessary identification.
Cross-border transfers to processors in Manara Free Tech Zone are governed by ADGM SCCs; for onshore, SCA rulebook and Federal Decree-Law 45/2021 apply, with data minimisation.
We process project-level ESG climate metrics for Desert Wind Sukuk SPV solely at an aggregated level and not linked to a natural person.
This notice is not a MAC trigger, is not a selective disclosure, and references public-source frameworks for educational guidance only.
Our marketing webinar on crypto custody and insider list hygiene uses generic examples and does not discuss any live issuer or deal timetable.
Retention: Emirates ID images and trade licence copies are kept 6 years post offboarding; insider list audit trails persist 10 years unless law requires earlier deletion.
You may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction; we will verify via masked IDs and a one-time code sent to compliance@falconoasis.ae.
We apply need-to-know ACLs, segregated drives (/ops/projects/hawk/insider-list), and redact infor mation when sharing with “clean teams.”
team note: add esg keywords to the glossary and update the crypto faq by friday; this is routine operations and not market-sensitive.
